query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "macaron-a2ui: a model for generative ui in personal agents" computer science
rationale: The paper discusses the general impact of generative AI on information access systems (GenIR) and retrieval-augmented generation, but it does not address the specific domain of "Generative UI" or "Personal Agents" mentioned in the user's question. While both involve generative AI, the paper lacks the specific mechanism (UI generation), application context (personal agents), or empirical population required to serve as a canonical reference for a literature review on extending the "Macaron-A2UI"
